The '''''Excalibur''''' was [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] personal [[C-3 passenger liner]], which he used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ship was used to transport the Emperor and his dignitaries to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], but traitor forces led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] [[Second battle of Imperial Center|attacked]] the ship via the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] [[Z-Ram|''Ram'']], the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Kimik]]'', and a pair of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. However, Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] arrived and deployed [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] led by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], who drove off Zaarin's forces.

Afterwards, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] looked into the attack, and identified the Assault Gunboats as having belonged to Emperor Palpatine's [[Emperor's special reserve guard|own special reserve guard]]. One of Stele's commanders, a [[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|lesser prophet]] in the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order of the Emperor]], had learned of this and likewise notified Stele of this development in the aftermath.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Excalibur'' will be attacked by two [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvette]] [[Z-Ram|''Ram'']] and then the next attack will vary depending on what happens to the two Assault Gunboats.

*If Z-Mu 1 is destroyed first then the attack consists of Assault Gunboats, which will attack the Liner, while [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] will attempt to divert the escorts away.

*If Z-Mu 2 is destroyed first then the attack consists of at least 9 additional Assassin-class corvettes as well as Assault Gunboats.

*If both were destroyed simultaneously then the Frigate ''[[Kimik]]'' will stay put and launch [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], to attack the Liner and TIE Avengers to attack the escorts.

In medieval legend and later literature, [[Wikipedia:Excalibur|Excalibur]] is the sword of the legendary [[Wikipedia:King Arthur|King Arthur]].
